exec: pm.test('returns updated poi id', function () { pm.expect(data.id).to.not.be.empty; });

request.description:
Update an existing POI. All fields are optional — only provided fields are updated.

Fields:
- name: slug-style name (e.g. lab-33)
- type: lecture_hall | lab | office | toilet | elevator | stairs
- geometry_wkt: WKT point string e.g. POINT(lng lat)
- metadata: arbitrary JSON stored in extra_data
Permanently delete a POI by its UUID. Returns { success: true, id: "..." } on success.
